actionUnits.condition: Invoke OnTriggerEnter on platform2 (2)'s BoxCollider (id: 606197088, isTrigger: true) by moving the Player (serialized reference fileID: 7425022) with a Collider (and preferably a Rigidbody) into the trigger volume. This tests AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour id: 606197086) from script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77. Note: Script compares `gameObject == player`, so no parenting will occur unless the Player reference equals the platform itself; still, OnTriggerEnter should be invoked.

Invoke OnTriggerExit on platform2 (2)'s BoxCollider by moving the same Player (fileID: 7425022) collider out of the trigger volume after having entered. This tests the second path of AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour id: 606197086). As above, due to the equality check `gameObject == player`, no unparenting will occur in practice unless misconfigured, but the callback should still run.
